versions.fullPrompt:
Create a short premium Vorinthex AI video asset for Vorinthex AI.

Target:
- Type: master-brand
- Slug: vorinthex-ai
- Description: Vorinthex AI master brand: The Nexus of Intelligence.



Visual system:
premium Vorinthex AI: obsidian black, polished chrome, dark glass, restrained reflections, precise engineered geometry, cinematic enterprise AI

Motion system:
slow orbital motion, controlled camera move, premium reveal, no chaotic cuts, no cartoon effects

Audio system:
Silent video only. Do not generate, include, synthesize, render, or attach any audio track.

Creative direction:
- Use an AI-first product launch asset style, suitable for a generated assets library.
- The video should clearly feel tied to Vorinthex AI, but avoid literal UI screenshots unless explicitly requested.
- Use abstract cinematic symbols, chrome orbital geometry, dark spatial depth, and controlled light.
- Keep composition clean enough to become a product preview loop.
- No readable text inside the video.
- This asset must be video-only. No music, no sound effects, no voice, no ambience, no generated audio track.

Custom instruction:
Create one 12 second premium Vorinthex AI vertical launch hero video based on the reference image: obsidian black AI galaxy, polished chrome geometry, dark glass, restrained silver reflections, slow cinematic forward drift, orbital Nexus energy, clean premium enterprise AI tone. Keep the center visually clean for a deterministic logo and title overlay added in post. No readable text, no captions, no watermark, no audio.

Negative prompt:
No text, no subtitles, no watermark, no readable letters, no cartoon, no neon cyberpunk colors, no glitter overload, no shaky camera, no low-quality CGI, no cluttered scene, no music, no sound effects, no voice, no ambience, no audio track.
No audio track, no music, no sound effects, no voiceover, no ambience.
